prompt: Task 42 has 8 Magic Number smells and Assertion Roulette in JNose.
Refactor the tests using JUnit 6 to eliminate the smells by extracting all hardcoded Arrays.asList() calls into private static final constants.
Add descriptive failure messages to assertEquals and assertTrue.
response: Extracted all input and expected lists (positive, negative, empty) into named static List<Integer> constants.
Appended custom error messages to every assertion to ensure the Assertion Roulette smell is cleared.
Maintained existing 100% test coverage safely handling null boundaries.
interactions.notes: Cleared the Magic Number smells by strictly managing list constants outside the test methods.
